en.summary: Imam Ja'far al-Sadiq (peace be upon him) identifies the most beloved servant of God as one who combines three qualities: truthfulness in speech, constancy in prayer and religious obligations, and trustworthiness. He then elaborates on the immense spiritual reward of fulfilling trusts — releasing a thousand knots of Hellfire from one's neck — while warning that Iblis deploys a hundred demons to tempt those entrusted with responsibilities. This teaching was delivered in the context of the early Shia community where trust and honesty in social dealings were considered essential markers of piety.

key_terms.صدوق: Saduq — extremely truthful, one who habitually speaks the truth
key_terms.أمانة: Amanah — trust, something entrusted to one's care; includes material and moral responsibilities
key_terms.عقدة: Uqdah — knot or collar; here metaphorical for bonds/shackles of punishment in Hellfire
key_terms.مردة: Maradah — the most rebellious and wicked ones; refers to the most powerful demons among Iblis's forces

en.seo_question: What does Imam Sadiq say about the virtue of fulfilling trusts in Islam?

ur.summary: امام جعفر صادق علیہ السلام نے فرمایا کہ اللہ کو سب سے زیادہ محبوب بندہ وہ ہے جو سچا ہو، نمازوں کا پابند ہو اور امانت دار ہو۔ امانت ادا کرنے والا آگ کی ہزار گرہوں سے نجات پاتا ہے، جبکہ ابلیس سو شیطان بھیجتا ہے تاکہ امانت دار کو گمراہ کرے۔

key_terms.عقدة: عقدہ — گرہ؛ آگ کی زنجیروں سے مراد

ur.seo_question: اسلام میں امانت کی ادائیگی کی فضیلت کیا ہے؟

tr.summary: İmam Cafer es-Sadık (a.s.), Allah'ın en sevdiği kulun doğru sözlü, namazlarına dikkatli ve emanet ehli olan kişi olduğunu bildirmiştir.
tr.seo_question: İslam'da emanete riayet etmenin fazileti nedir?

fa.summary: امام جعفر صادق علیه السلام فرمودند محبوب‌ترین بنده نزد خداوند کسی است که راستگو، نمازخوان و امانتدار باشد.

key_terms.عقدة: عقده — گره؛ استعاره از زنجیرهای آتش

fa.seo_question: فضیلت ادای امانت از دیدگاه امام صادق چیست؟

id.summary: Imam Ja'far al-Shadiq menyatakan bahwa hamba yang paling dicintai Allah adalah yang jujur, menjaga shalat, dan menunaikan amanah.
id.seo_question: Apa keutamaan menunaikan amanah menurut Imam Shadiq?

bn.summary: ইমাম জাফর আস-সাদিক বলেছেন, আল্লাহর কাছে সবচেয়ে প্রিয় বান্দা হলো সত্যবাদী, নামাজ হেফাজতকারী ও আমানতদার।

es.summary: El Imam Ja'far al-Sadiq identifica al siervo más amado de Dios como aquel que es veraz, constante en la oración y cumplidor de los depósitos de confianza.

key_terms.عقدة: Uqdah — nudo; metáfora del castigo infernal

es.seo_question: ¿Cuál es la virtud de cumplir los depósitos de confianza en el Islam?

fr.summary: L'Imam Ja'far al-Sâdiq désigne le serviteur le plus aimé de Dieu comme celui qui est véridique, assidu dans la prière et fidèle aux dépôts de confiance.

key_terms.عقدة: Uqdah — noeud ; métaphore des chaînes du châtiment
key_terms.مردة: Maradah — les plus rebelles des démons

fr.seo_question: Quelle est la vertu de l'accomplissement des dépôts de confiance en Islam ?

de.summary: Imam Dscha'far al-Sâdiq bezeichnet den beliebtesten Diener Gottes als den Wahrhaftigen, Gebetstreuen und Vertrauenswürdigen.
de.seo_question: Was sagt Imam Sadiq über die Tugend der Erfüllung von Vertrauensgütern?

ru.summary: Имам Джа'фар ас-Садик называет самым любимым рабом Аллаха того, кто правдив, соблюдает молитвы и исполняет доверия.
ru.seo_question: Какова добродетель исполнения доверия в Исламе?

zh.summary: 伊玛目贾法尔·萨迪格指出真主最喜爱的仆人是诚实、守礼拜且忠于信托之人。
zh.seo_question: 伊玛目萨迪格关于履行信托的美德说了什么？

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ إِدْرِيسَ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبِي عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ يَحْيَى بْنِ عِمْرَانَ الْأَشْعَرِيِّ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ آدَمَ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ الْخَزَّازِ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ أَبِي الْعَلَاءِ عَنِ الصَّادِقِ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ
isnad_matn.matn_ar: قَالَ سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ أَحَبُّ الْعِبَادِ إِلَى اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ رَجُلٌ صَدُوقٌ فِي حَدِيثِهِ مُحَافِظٌ عَلَى صَلَوَاتِهِ وَمَا افْتَرَضَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ مَعَ أَدَاءِ الْأَمَانَةِ ثُمَّ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ مَنِ اؤْتُمِنَ عَلَى أَمَانَةٍ فَأَدَّاهَا فَقَدْ حَلَّ أَلْفَ عُقْدَةٍ مِنْ عُنُقِهِ مِنْ عُقَدِ النَّارِ فَبَادِرُوا بِأَدَاءِ الْأَمَانَةِ فَإِنَّ مَنِ اؤْتُمِنَ عَلَى أَمَانَةٍ وُكِّلَ بِهِ إِبْلِيسُ مِائَةَ شَيْطَانٍ مِنْ مَرَدَةِ أَعْوَانِهِ لِيُضِلُّوهُ وَيُوَسْوِسُوا إِلَيْهِ حَتَّى يُهْلِكُوهُ إِلَّا مَنْ عَصَمَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ

narrators.known_identity: al-Husayn ibn Ahmad ibn Idris al-Qummi, a prominent Shia hadith narrator and student of al-Saduq

narrators.ambiguity_note: Refers to Ahmad ibn Idris al-Qummi, identified from preceding narrator as his son.
narrators.known_identity: Ahmad ibn Idris al-Qummi (d. 306 AH), a major Shia hadith scholar in Qum

narrators.name_ar: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ يَحْيَى بْنِ عِمْرَانَ الْأَشْعَرِيُّ
narrators.name_en: Muhammad ibn Ahmad ibn Yahya ibn Imran al-Ash'ari
narrators.known_identity: Muhammad ibn Ahmad ibn Yahya al-Ash'ari al-Qummi, author of Nawadir al-Hikma

narrators.ambiguity_note: Likely Muhammad ibn Adam al-Nasafi, though identification is not entirely certain.
narrators.known_identity: Muhammad ibn Adam, a hadith transmitter
al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Abi Uthman al-Khazzaz, a known Shia narrator
al-Husayn ibn Abi al-Ala' al-Khaffaf, a companion of Imam al-Sadiq (AS)
Imam Ja'far al-Sadiq (AS), the sixth Imam (d. 148 AH)

similar_content_hints.description: A narration in al-Kafi about the signs of a believer including truthfulness and trustworthiness, where these qualities are described as markers of true faith.
The Quranic verse about the trust (amanah) offered to the heavens, earth, and mountains (33:72), establishing the cosmic significance of trustworthiness.
Narrations about Iblis and his armies targeting specific acts of worship, particularly those involving social obligations and trusts between people.
